title: FaceTape
overview: A junkie decides to come clean from abusing an analog VR drug called FaceTape only to find his life outside of his addiction is far from stable.

title: Touken Ranbu the Stage: Hiden Tsuki to Taiyou to Hoshiboshi yo
overview: Stageplay based on Touken Ranbu.

title: Don't Let The Bastards Grind You Down
overview: "Don't Let The Bastards Grind You Down" is a documentary film about British social policy. The focus is on the political struggle against neoliberal austerity policies, which have their origins in the hated Thatcher government.  The film features the former socialist MP Dave Nellist, who is now the national chair of the Trade Unionist & Socialist Coalition and Hannah Sell, the general secretary of the Socialist Party. The film features a local election campaign in the miners' town of Nuneaton, students campaigning against an increase in tuition fees and refuse workers from Birmingham striking against massive cuts to their wages.

title: The Wronged of Juiced
overview: Gus sees a boy drinking juice. It is not the same as he remembers.

title: Summer's End
overview: Grace has spent the summer looking after her dad, who is still mourning over the loss of his wife who died when Grace was a child. When her unpredictable older brother Oscar brings his friends to stay with them, Grace is forced to confront her relationship with the past and her expectations of the future.

title: Thera: The Inverted Planet
overview: On another world much like our own, a young Samoyed named Seamus Alessandro O'Shaughnessy discovers a lost girl named Dakota who has unfathomable magic! Seamus must overcome great challenges both physical & emotional alongside his best friend Carolina Oriqueda Campbell Keeshond-Seal to save Great Canyon City from the Menace known as The Blurred Blaze! Can our heroes defeat their foes while simultaneously protecting an innocent child in the process? And who exactly is The Blurred Blaze?

title: Godzilla Minus Zero
overview: Direct sequel to Takashi Yamazaki’s Godzilla Minus One. Plot TBA.

title: Gisèle - Au nom de toutes
overview: Follows the lawyer Gisèle Halimi and her historic defense of Basque individuals accused of crimes committed during the conflict in Basque Country.

title: Archangel
overview: A weapons researcher protects his community from an aggressive corporation.

title: Wild Horse Nine
overview: Shortly before the 1973 Chilean coup, CIA agents Chris and Lee are dispatched from Santiago to Easter Island by their bureau chief, MJ. Amongst the Island's iconic statues, and as the longtime partners wrestle with their dark pasts and present conspiracies, Chris's newfound bond with a pair of rebellious students threatens to send everyone’s trip to this remote paradise sideways.

title: The Cat in the Hat
overview: Doing what he does best, the Cat spreads joy to kids in his hilarious, signature, and singularly irreverent way, transporting them and audiences on a fantastical journey through a world they've never seen before. Our hero takes on his toughest assignment yet for the I.I.I.I. (Institute for the Institution of Imagination and Inspiration, LLC) to cheer up Gabby and Sebastian, a pair of siblings struggling to move to a new town. Known for taking things too far, this could be this agent of chaos' last chance to prove himself...or lose his magical hat!

title: Runner
overview: Hank Malone, a high-end courier  has three hours to transport an organ to save a seven-year-old girl in need of an immediate transplant. The seemingly simple mission turns deadly when the leader of a notorious crime syndicate becomes hell-bent on claiming the organ.

title: Geister
overview: After her death, 17-year-old Aisha finds her way into Elias' dreams from the afterlife and a passionate romance begins in which the boundaries between dream and reality become blurred.

title: Jennerwein – Hochsaison
overview: Jennerwein has barely started his job in Garmisch-Partenkirchen when a Danish ski jumper falls to his death, the president of the Winter Games Committee narrowly escapes an assassination attempt, and anonymous letters announce further crimes. Amidst suspicious villagers and vain local politics, Jennerwein must unmask a perpetrator who craves attention and is playing a deadly serious game.

title: The Black Pearl
overview: A young engineer's dream of becoming a fighter pilot for the Royal Moroccan Air Force is put on hold until he unravels the mystery of his missing parents.

title: Tumšā robeža
overview: A historical thriller about Latvia in 1939 - a year before the Russian occupation.

title: Lakadbaggha 2: The Monkey Business
overview: Sequel to Lakadbaggha (2023). Plot TBA.

title: Sacamantecas
overview: Álava, late 19th century. As the Third Carlist War rages, several women are found strangled to death on the outskirts of Vitoria.

title: Wanderer
overview: WANDERER is a religious action thriller set in an alternate, dystopian future where the United States has been disbanded and divided into eight individual factions. A lone wanderer journeys across these factions, carrying a forbidden item: a Holy Bible. Hunted relentlessly by faction leaders and their military forces, the Wanderer uses the Word of God to spread hope among the oppressed citizens and fight back against the evil forces controlling them.

title: Untitled Abbott Le-Eldred Film
overview: No details have been provided for this film yet.

title: Ramayana
overview: First part of the epic Ramayana duology.

title: Malvina
overview: Malvina is an angel sent to earth for being ignorant of it's problems. she falls to earth and after an incounter with a grieving mother seeks adamentley the love she talks about. when receiving this love finally she becomes addicted. she is filled with so much love for everyone she eventually loses herself completely in the desires and wants of everyone around her.

title: Badinter
overview: Biopic about the famous French lawyer and politician, Robert Badinter.

title: Kaamelott: The Second Chapter (Part II)
overview: Third and final film in the Kaamelott franchise.

title: Harvested 4
overview: A small town legend returns from the dead to serve vengeance on Thanksgiving night.

title: Il faut brûler maman
overview: A comedy of manners set in a funeral home.

title: The House with Chimaeras
overview: At the peak of his career, famous Kyiv architect Władysław Horodecki is desperately fighting his own demons. At the same time, darkness emanated by the evil forces bringing menace to the city is gradually enveloping the entire Kyiv. To defeat evil, Horodecki has to take on the mission of creating an architectural Quadrangle of Good.

title: The Great Beyond
overview: A young newlywed couple struggles to survive against a supernatural entity.

title: Ebenezer: A Christmas Carol
overview: Ebenezer Scrooge embarks on a supernatural journey to face his past, present and future and fight for a second chance at happiness.

title: The Young People
overview: Centers on a couple of school friends, one of whom starts to develop red flag behavior.

title: Лукоморье
overview: Fantasy based on a script by Natalia Dobrovolskaya.

title: Santa's Workshop
overview: Nine-year-old Mari is really looking forward to Christmas. Her journalist dad, Svein, on the other hand, loves his job so much, he barely notices the festive season. One night, Mari’s Christmas list vanishes – and in its place lies a mysterious mitten. The mitten sends Mari, Svein and her adventurous grandma on an exciting quest to find Santa Claus. Meanwhile, Stubby the Wishlist Elf is in a panic — he’s lost his mitten, which might just lead this curious family straight to the secret location of Santa’s workshop! He must stop them before it’s too late!

title: Scars of Revenge
overview: One has no memory, the other cannot forget.

title: Shame and Money
overview: After losing their livelihood in a village, a Kosovar family is forced to move to the capital in pursuit of a place in a hypercapitalist society.

title: Liberated from Paradise: Resonance of the Heart
overview: Anime movie sequel of Expelled from Paradise.

title: I Play Rocky
overview: A struggling actor with a partially paralyzed face and a speech impediment writes a script that a big movie studio wants to buy, but he refuses to sell it unless he gets to play the lead.  Turning down an offer of life-changing money, he instead works for pennies to get the movie made with himself in the starring role.  The movie becomes the biggest box office hit of 1976, notching ten Oscar nominations and winning Best Picture.  The true story of the making of the iconic movie Rocky.

title: Return of the Living Dead
overview: Eighteen months after the events at the UNEEDA Warehouse in Louisville, KY, a new Trioxin 2-4-5 leak puts a small Pennsylvania town on the brink of a zombie outbreak during Christmas 1985.

title: Plucked
overview: In Gilded Age New York, a rebellious woman plans to divorce her emotionally unstable husband. Consequently, a polite and civilized evening violently spirals into pandemonium. Some things never change-until they do.

title: The Virus of Pathological Kindness
overview: On a cold winter's night in 1983, a young teacher of Serbo-Croatian recieves a surprise visit. A nude man, claiming to be from Belgrade in the far future tells her that the world as they know it will crumble and that he believes he knows how to stop it.

title: Super Champions
overview: Seven people think about their place in the universe.

title: The Death of Marion Wayne
overview: Marion Wayne is a chaotic gunslinger traveling the country with his small gang. When he gets captured by the law he learns of an indifference of power within the law, and upon breaking out of prison he pursues a revenge arc to balance the system.

title: Volcanic vs. Pedex
overview: Pedex was tasked with protecting the Shadow Realm after Amelia's death as a way of honoring her legacy. When Pedex senses an unnatural presence, he discovers it is Volcanic, the Fire Demon. Seeing this as an invasion, Pedex confronts him, and the two engage in a violent battle between Fire and Darkness. The conflict extends beyond the Shadow Realm and extends to the small fictional town of Oldwood, where the fighting becomes even more intense and destructive.

title: A Time in Eternity
overview: A woman embarks on an unyielding and possibly hopeless search for her missing husband, a journey that strains her already fragile relationship with her daughter. Along the way, she also faces the unwelcome advances of her persistent brother-in-law.

title: The Uprising
overview: During the English Peasants' Revolt in 1381, a farmer becomes a leader of the rebellion against the Crown forces of a then-14-year-old King Richard II.

title: Iliya Muromets
overview: Iliya the Knight of Murom, son of a peasant, was born disabled and was unable to walk until he turned 33. He then was miraculously healed and became a great warrior during his faithful service to Kniaz Vladimir Monomakh by fighting against invaders and helping Kniaz consolide Russianlands.

title: Greenland
overview: Three years after a young girl’s disappearance during a trip to Norway, her passport resurfaces in Greenland. Without telling anyone, her 17-year-old sister embarks on a quest to solve the mystery of her disappearance. Torn between the hope of finding their first daughter and the fear of losing their second, her parents, though separated, set off together for Greenland.

title: V. Shantaram
overview: Chronicles Shantaram Rajaram Vankudre, aka V. Shantaram, on his remarkable journey from the silent era through the advent of sound and colour, showcasing his evolution as one of India’s most influential filmmakers.

title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping
overview: Return to the world of Panem 24 years before the events of The Hunger Games for the reaping of the 50th Hunger Games, also known as the Second Quarter Quell.

title: Way of the Warrior Kid
overview: Jake is an injured Navy SEAL who becomes a mentor for his shy, struggling nephew Marc. Using the principles of his military training, Jake teaches Marc how to be a Warrior Kid as he enters high school.

title: Турбозавры. Суперфильм
overview: Viewers will learn about the new adventures of dinosaurs who can transform into cars, and the children Katya, Petya, and Ippolit.

title: Timeless
overview: Rick van Wijk's Thesis film

title: Der Regenbogenfisch
overview: The rainbow fish, an outsider obsessed with his glittering scales, learns the power of friendship on an adventurous sea voyage with the little blue fish. He finds his place in a colorful fish community—and realizes that sharing brings people together.

title: MEN TOO
overview: A man struggles to stay strong after a painful divorce, moving through his days with a quiet loneliness that no one notices. This PSA explores how a single moment of genuine care can change everything for someone who feels forgotten.

title: Jimmy
overview: A look into the life of American actor James Stewart, whose inspiring tale of valor, purpose and faith will win over everyone.

title: The Tragedy of the Bernalillo County Detectives
overview: 1979. An intense conspiracy unfolds after the robbery of a legendary fortune.

title: The Beast of Gevaudan 3
overview: Plot TBA

title: Demain, je tombe amoureux
overview: On the day of his retirement, Émile, a literature professor in Dieppe, gives his young students one last lesson on literature and love, encouraging them to become the poets of their own lives. A student asks him about his own feelings. Is Émile still in love with his wife? Unable to answer, he discovers, once he returns home, that his wife has left him. He is forced to apply his own precepts to himself. Two encounters and a reunion will then help him reinvent himself.

title: SIMULACRA (The Movie - Cancelled)
overview: SIMULACRA was a film adaptation of Kaigan Games’ 2017 hit phone-horror game of the same title, that has now been changed to a Limited Series.

title: Narnia
overview: The new upcoming film by Greta Gerwig.

title: Madden
overview: After the legendarily fiery coach exits from the NFL, John Madden teams with Electronic Arts to become the unlikely co-creator of a pioneering video game franchise.

title: Hexed
overview: An awkward teenage boy and his Type-A mom discover that what makes him unusual might be magical powers that will turn their lives and a secret world of magic upside down.

title: Paper Tiger
overview: Two brothers pursue the American Dream but get entangled in a dangerous Russian mafia scheme that terrorizes their family, testing their bond as betrayal becomes possible.

title: Focker-In-Law
overview: The fourth installment in the franchise. Plot TBA.

title: Knocker
overview: The Snegirev family is preparing to celebrate the New Year together for the last time, after which Anfisa and Igor will tell their son Roma about the divorce.

title: Pirate Mo and the Legend of the Red Ruby
overview: Aboard a ship, back when terrible pirates roamed the seven seas, a child, Mo, grows up with a crew of ragtag seadogs and the ship’s pet… goat. Having grown up into a brave girl, Mo must wrestle with her father’s career of piracy and overcome trials as she seeks to understand the enigma of her origin. Captured by the evil pirate Peg-Leg Olle, Mo bumps into cabin boy Hannes. Together with him, Claas and his motley crew, brave Mo will have to defeat Olle and find the Blood Red Blood Ruby of Doom, to restore peace and harmony to the land. Pirate Mo is a swashbuckling adventure full of heart, guts, and hope for a better world, led by a young girl whose goodness is matched only by her derring-do.

title: A December Tale 2: The Lost Letter
overview: Whilst preparing for yet another round of spreading holiday cheer, saint Nicholas discovers an unopened letter that had been sent to him by a young boy named Borys 30 years ago. Now the latter is a sucssesful businessman who had lost the abbility to see the joys and whimsy of life after being severly beaten down by the world around him. The legendary giftgiver enters a race against time to help the broken man regain his childlike wonder, or else one will forever loose the abbility to feel joy and the other, his magical powers.

title: Tears of Neon
overview: At the age of five, Chris, a young village boy meets his mother, Czesława, who is at the cusp of conquering entertainment industry by adopting a new persona - Violetta Villas. An unbelievably talented, ambitious mother and a sensitive child go on a decades long journey through Warsaw, Paris and Las Vegas.

title: Plastic Guns
overview: A standoff reveals unsettling truths for an old cowboy.

title: Eureka or (The Quest for Nothing)
overview: A lonely surfer sets out to find the holy grail.

title: Instrucciones para reparar un sombrero
overview: Jonas, a young magician who has retired from stage, is invited to participate in a film the chaotic production forces him to confront a past trauma, while unexpectedly giving him the chance to overcome it.

title: SP-2125
overview: After receiving a mysterious email offering to fund his deep space exploration, Damen Richards must make his way to the moon to begin his journey across the stars.
